description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet or shelf unit with a dark brown wood grain finish. The front face features a combination of open shelving and closed compartments: there are four open cubby shelves on the right and a single-door cabinet with a knob on the left, as well as two smaller drawers beneath the cabinet. The wood grain pattern is visible on all exterior surfaces, giving it a natural and textured appearance. The sides and back are solid panels with no openings or decorative features. The knobs on the doors and drawers are small and round, likely made of metal or plastic. This piece is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or residential entryways for storage and organization.
description: A dark wood grain cabinet with open shelves, a single-door compartment, and two drawers, featuring small round knobs. Its design is functional and suitable for urban storage needs.
description_view_0: The front view shows four open shelves, a single-door cabinet on the left, and two drawers below, all with visible knobs.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid wood panel with the wood grain pattern, no openings or features visible.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with a consistent grain pattern and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: The right side view shows another solid wood panel, mirroring the left side, with no openings or features.
